Title: Queue MaterialProvider
Description: Goes through a queue of Material Provider slots from highest to lowest priority. If a Material Provider in the queue doesn’t provide a block type, then the next one in the queue is queried. If no slot provides a block, then the Queue Material Provider will not provide a block. The query stops at the first slot that provides a block.

Outputs.Label: Queue
Outputs.Description: Slots are queried from top to bottom.
